instruction: The car has an extra wheel mark near the left side. Remove the duplicate.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <rect id="body" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="64" width="96" height="24" rx="4" ry="4" />
  <polygon id="roof" fill="#3b82f6" points="28,64 40,44 88,44 100,64" />
  <rect id="window" fill="#bae6fd" x="42" y="46" width="44" height="18" />
  <circle id="wheel-left" fill="#222" cx="32" cy="92" r="8" />
  <circle id="wheel-right" fill="#222" cx="96" cy="92" r="8" />
  <circle id="headlight" fill="#fde047" cx="110" cy="72" r="3" />
  <rect id="license-plate" fill="#f5f5f5" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.5" x="104" y="80" width="10" height="4" />
  <circle id="wheel-left-dup" fill="#222" cx="48" cy="92" r="8" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <rect id="body" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="64" width="96" height="24" rx="4" ry="4" />
  <polygon id="roof" fill="#3b82f6" points="28,64 40,44 88,44 100,64" />
  <rect id="window" fill="#bae6fd" x="42" y="46" width="44" height="18" />
  <circle id="wheel-left" fill="#222" cx="32" cy="92" r="8" />
  <circle id="wheel-right" fill="#222" cx="96" cy="92" r="8" />
  <circle id="headlight" fill="#fde047" cx="110" cy="72" r="3" />
  <rect id="license-plate" fill="#f5f5f5" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.5" x="104" y="80" width="10" height="4" />
</svg>
